steps.title: Identify the shared characteristic
steps.content: Both Stan and Horridus carry the same time marker in the notes: the Late Cretaceous period. This shared time period is the similarity the student should emphasize.

steps.title: Apply the similarity to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly names both specimens and emphasizes their shared time period—the Late Cretaceous. B emphasizes location differences, C doesn't compare these specific specimens, and D mentions only one specimen. That matches choice A — A is correct.
